changes.description: Complete rewrite of SKILL.md for qwen3-30b. Key changes: (1) Added strong directive to always use execute_command with Python scripts instead of computing manually or using read_file for large data. (2) Provided complete, copy-pasteable Python scripts for both task types. (3) Removed irrelevant USGS background content and 15-min aggregation instructions. (4) Simplified to a direct workflow: list_directory -> write_file (Python script) -> execute_command. (5) Used csv module instead of pandas for return periods to avoid dependency issues. (6) Computed skewness manually to avoid scipy dependency.
